$comment: Canonical source: haderach-platform/docs/artifact-manifest.schema.json. Update both repos together when schema changes.
title: HaderachArtifactManifest

app_id.description: Stable platform identifier for this app.

version.description: Semantic version with build metadata, e.g. 1.2.3+build.45.

commit_sha.description: Full git commit SHA for the build.

published_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of artifact publication.

platform_contract_version.description: Platform contract version this manifest targets.
